name: BayFirst Financial Corp.
business: BayFirst Financial Corp. is a bank holding company that operates through its wholly owned subsidiary, BayFirst National Bank, providing community banking services to consumers and small businesses in the Tampa Bay/Sarasota region. It offers a range of deposit products, loans (commercial, real estate, consumer, and government guaranteed), and related banking services. The company also originates USDA and SBA 504 loans through its community banking centers.
sellsTo: Consumers and small businesses in the Tampa Bay/Sarasota region
Businesses seeking government guaranteed loans (USDA, SBA 504)
Healthcare businesses through a specialized healthcare banking solution

exposures.sentence: The Company's cybersecurity and information security practices incorporate preventative, detective, corrective, compensatory, and deterrent controls.
The Bank offers... construction and development loans.
The Bank also offers... residential mortgages, and home equity lines of credit.
The USDA guarantees up to 80% of USDA B&I loan balances as an incentive for financial institutions to make loans to businesses located in rural areas.
The development and use of artificial intelligence by us or others, or our inability to effectively and timely implement its use, may adversely affect the Company.
